overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a morning walk through a futuristic dystopian city. The player character crosses intersections, walks past a 24/7 convenience store and a homeless encampment with a burning barrel, and gazes up at towering megastructures while encountering various pedestrians and light traffic.

events.description: begins crossing the street at crosswalk, following pedestrian in blue jacket
reaches opposite sidewalk and turns left to continue walking

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection crosswalk toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket and orange cap walking ahead of ego across the street

entered.detail: tall pole with traffic signals at intersection corner
large illuminated billboard sign for convenience store atop building
white painted stripes marking pedestrian crossing area
tall modern tower with blue and white facade and horizontal lines
red street sign with white text reading 'Sequoia' mounted on pole

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a city sidewalk at a sunny intersection. The ego crosses the asphalt crosswalk following a pedestrian in a blue jacket, with the 24/7 store sign visible in the distance. After crossing, the ego turns left onto the sidewalk, passing a street sign labeled 'Sequoia' while sparse traffic moves through the intersection.

events.description: fully enters sidewalk area alongside the 24/7 store building
camera looks upward at the towering buildings and megastructures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, briefly looking up at the architecture

notable_agents.action: sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with dark facade and illuminated signage
futuristic four-door sedan driving on the street
massive towering building with industrial design visible in the distance
red and white striped concrete barriers lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk beside the 24/7 store building, the ego observes the futuristic urban architecture. The camera pans upward to admire the towering megastructures against the bright morning sky. A sedan drives past on the right, and concrete barriers with red stripes line the sidewalk edge as the encampment area approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with homeless encampment and burning barrel

events.description: approaches homeless encampment with burning barrel and scattered debris
passes close by the burning barrel with visible flames

agents.ego_description: walking past the makeshift shelter and burning barrel, observing the encampment

notable_agents.action: child with red hair and blue vest walking on the sidewalk near the encampment

entered.detail: makeshift living space with couch, boxes, and debris arranged on cardboard
metal barrel with active flames burning inside, emitting smoke
dirty upholstered sofa sitting on the sidewalk as part of the encampment
scattered cardboard boxes and containers around the encampment

segments.scene_description: The ego walks past a homeless encampment occupying the sidewalk, featuring a burning barrel with active flames, a worn couch, and scattered cardboard boxes. A child with red hair walks nearby. The concrete barriers that were on the right are now visible on the left as the path continues past the makeshift shelter.

events.description: leaves the encampment area and continues along cleaner sidewalk section
approaches intersection with crosswalk and traffic signals

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with green hair and face mask walking toward the camera

entered.detail: multi-story building with red brick facade and many windows
elevated walkway or bridge connecting buildings across the street
traffic signal pole at the upcoming intersection

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk past the encampment, the ego walks toward an intersection with a prominent red brick building on the left. Various pedestrians walk in both directions, including a person with distinctive green hair. Concrete barriers line the right side of the path as the ego approaches the crosswalk and an overpass bridge visible in the distance.

events.description: crosses the street and enters the intersection area
camera tilts upward to look at the massive megastructure tower overhead

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while looking up at the towering megastructure above

entered.detail: massive futuristic building with dark metal facade, blue panels, and red warning lights
small guard station or checkpoint building at the base of the megastructure
red illuminated lights along the edge of the megastructure building

segments.scene_description: The ego crosses the intersection and approaches a massive megastructure tower that dominates the skyline. The camera tilts upward to reveal the building's immense scale, dark metal construction, blue paneling, and red warning lights. A small security booth sits at the base of the tower as the video ends with a dramatic view looking up at the futuristic architecture against the bright sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sunlit dystopian city, moving from a mundane street intersection toward the overwhelming scale of a corporate megastructure. It begins by crossing a sunny asphalt intersection behind a pedestrian in a blue jacket, turning left past a Sequoia street sign as the camera glides toward a 24/7 convenience store. As the camera pans upward to admire the towering architecture, the path leads past concrete barriers and into a homeless encampment marked by a burning barrel, a worn couch, and a red-haired child. The scene then opens up as the ego passes a red brick building and pedestrians with green hair, moving toward a distant overpass bridge. Finally, the camera crosses a second intersection and tilts sharply upward to reveal the immense scale of a dark metal tower with blue paneling and red warning lights dominating the bright morning sky.
